title: Acromegaly
chief_complaint: My hands and feet have gotten bigger over the past 5 years. My wedding ring doesn't fit anymore. My shoe size went from 10 to 13. My face looks different in old photos. I have headaches and I snore terribly.

physical_exam.General: Coarse facial features, frontal bossing, prognathism, macroglossia, widened spaced teeth
physical_exam.Hands: Enlarged, spade-like hands. Skin thickened. Unable to fully close fist.
physical_exam.Visual: Confrontation visual fields: Bitemporal hemianopia. Fundoscopy: Normal optic discs.

hidden_data.ogtt: OGTT with 75g glucose: GH fails to suppress (GH nadir 8 ng/mL, normal <1). Confirms acromegaly.
hidden_data.mri_pituitary: 2.5cm pituitary macroadenoma extending into suprasellar cistern and compressing optic chiasm. No cavernous sinus invasion.
hidden_data.colonoscopy: 2 tubular adenomas (acromegaly increases colon cancer risk)

correct_diagnosis: Acromegaly from GH-Secreting Pituitary Macroadenoma with Bitemporal Hemianopia
key_learning_points: Acromegaly = excess GH/IGF-1 in adults. Gigantism if before growth plate closure. 99% caused by pituitary adenoma
Clinical features: Enlarging hands/feet, coarse facies, prognathism, macroglossia, HTN, DM, OSA, carpal tunnel, hyperhidrosis
Diagnosis: Elevated IGF-1 + failure of GH suppression on OGTT (GH >1 after 75g glucose)
Complications: Cardiomyopathy (leading cause of death), HTN, DM, OSA, colon cancer (2.5x risk), arthritis
Treatment: Transsphenoidal adenomectomy (first-line). Medical: Octreotide/Lanreotide (somatostatin analogs), Pegvisomant (GH antagonist). Radiotherapy if surgery fails
